Title: Payload Accommodation
Definition: The spacecraft shall provide interfaces for payload instruments.

Title: Communication Capability
Definition: The spacecraft shall support bidirectional communication with the ground segment.

Title: Power Provision
Definition: The spacecraft shall provide sufficient electrical power to all subsystems.

Title: Pointing Accuracy
Definition: The spacecraft shall achieve pointing accuracy sufficient for science operations.

Title: Environmental Survivability
Definition: The spacecraft shall withstand mission environmental conditions.

Title: Data Handling
Definition: The spacecraft shall handle, store, and route science and housekeeping data.

Title: Calibration Support
Definition: The spacecraft shall support instrument calibration activities.
